items.title: He Was Arrested as a Russian Hacker, But The Truth Is Far Scarier ☠ Darknet Diaries Ep. 163: Ola
items.author: Jack Rhysider
items.content:
<article>In 2019, Ola Bini, a Swedish programmer and privacy advocate, was arrested in Ecuador with no evidence and no motive. But what's really going on goes far deeper than he could imagine.

Visit https://darknetdiaries.com/episode/163/ for a list of sources, full transcripts, and to listen to all episodes.</article>
